name: salessidekick
description: Your AI-powered Chief of Staff for enterprise sales. Self-personalizing — run /setup once and it becomes YOUR sales AI. 22 commands, 11 skills, 6 Notion databases. Processes call transcripts, generates competitive strategies, manages territory pipelines, and crafts context-aware outreach.

notion.description: Single source of truth — 6 databases for companies, contacts, deals, tasks, call notes, and LinkedIn posts

google-calendar.description: Meeting context for daily briefings and prep
